name: Dessert Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cornmeal, egg, whole wheat flour, honey or molasses, unbleached white flour, oil, baking powder, and milk.
2. Mix together until all ingredients are well incorporated. The mixture will be quite watery.
3. Pour the batter into a greased 8-inch x 8-inch pan or similar dish.
4. Bake for 30 minutes at 325 degrees Fahrenheit, or until the top is springy when gently touched.
5. Serve hot in a bowl or dish. The center may be somewhat like custard, so it might not be ideal to eat it directly from your hand like regular bread. It can be served with honey, jam, milk, or plain. Enjoy!
